name: Object Array (Simple Repeating Items)
summary: Simple repeating items using a Control bound to an array property — auto-generated layout
whenToUse: Collecting a short list of simple items (1-2 fields per item)
Quick lists like contacts, names, or simple records
When you don't need control over the detail layout
notes: The simplest way to add repeating items — just point a Control at an array property
Each item renders as a card with auto-generated layout for its properties
You lose control over how item fields are arranged (no custom layout)
Best for small lists with simple items; use ListWithDetail for complex items
Each property on an item renders as a separate row on the card
